doc_title_en: Notice on Revision to FY3/26 Year-End Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase)

key_facts.reason_jp: 経営基盤の長期安定化に向けた財務体質の強化と事業展開に備えるため内部留保を確保しつつ、総還元性向50%以上を目標に配当水準の向上

summary_en: Year-end dividend for FY3/26 raised from 25 yen to 38 yen per share (+13 yen, +52%). Full-year dividend now 57 yen (prior forecast 44 yen). Increase reflects consolidated earnings disclosed 14 May 2026 and shareholder-return policy targeting total payout ratio of 50%+ (dividends plus buybacks).
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当を1株当たり25円から38円に増配（+13円、+52%）。通期配当は57円（前回予想44円）。2026年5月14日発表の連結業績を踏まえ、配当と自社株買いで総還元性向50%以上を目標とする方針に基づく。
tag_en: Dividend hike - FY3/26 year-end: 25 yen → 38 yen (+13 yen, +52%)
